name: Beef Enchilada Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Cream of Mushroom Soup (condensed low-fat)
6 ounces Sharp Cheddar cheese, grated (reduced fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook ground beef, garlic, onion, and chili powder in a frying pan over medium heat until browned.
2. Add beans and chilies to the pan.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F.
4. Mix half a cup of soup (do not add water) with stewed tomatoes.
5. Spread the tomato mixture on the bottom of an 8 to 9-inch square baking pan coated with non-stick spray.
6. Layer with half the meat/bean mixture and half the cheese.
7. Repeat layers with tortillas, meat, sauce, and cheese.
8. Cover loosely with foil.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 45 minutes.
